videos.title: How to Embed YouTube Videos in HTML
videos.description: Complete guide to embedding YouTube videos using iframes, including responsive design, custom parameters, and privacy-enhanced mode.

videos.title: YouTube IFrame Player API Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to control YouTube embeds programmatically using the IFrame Player API with play, pause, seek, and event handling.

videos.title: Build a YouTube Clone with HTML CSS JavaScript
videos.description: Full project tutorial building a YouTube-like interface with custom player, video grid, and search functionality.

videos.title: Responsive YouTube Embeds with CSS
videos.description: Kevin Powell shows multiple CSS techniques for making YouTube embeds responsive, including aspect-ratio boxes and modern CSS approaches.

videos.title: YouTube API - Build a Video Gallery
videos.description: Build a complete video gallery application using the YouTube Data API and IFrame Player API.

videos.title: JavaScript Media Session API with YouTube
videos.description: How to integrate YouTube embeds with the Media Session API for lock screen and notification controls.

videos.title: Lazy Loading YouTube Videos for Performance
videos.description: Techniques for lazy loading YouTube embeds with Intersection Observer to improve page performance and loading speed.
